caption: A man wearing a white traditional garment and a dark cap sits at a table in a studio setting with a red background. He is positioned in front of a microphone and looks towards the side. To his right, a digital screen displays a smaller image of another man in a red cap, with text identifying him as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI" and "POLITICAL ANALYST" from "LAGOS." Above this image, the text "ON THE PHONE" is visible. At the bottom of the screen, a purple banner reads "PLUS POLITICS," and a larger headline states "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The "plustv" logo is in the upper left corner. Across the frames, the man remains seated and relatively still, with only slight changes in his posture and facial expression. Banners at the bottom provide links for following the channel and watching online at "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV" and "PLUSTVAFRICA."
